sql.monthly_new_account_openings: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', a.date)::date AS opened_month, COUNT(a.account_id) AS new_accounts FROM account a WHERE a.date >= DATE '1993-01-01' AND a.date < DATE '1999-01-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
sql.frequency_share: SELECT a.frequency, COUNT(a.account_id) AS account_count FROM account a GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY account_count DESC;
sql.district_quarter_heatmap_1996: SELECT d."A2" AS district, DATE_TRUNC('quarter', a.date)::date AS opened_quarter, COUNT(a.account_id) AS new_account_count FROM account a JOIN district d ON d.district_id = a.district_id WHERE a.date >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND a.date < DATE '1997-01-01' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;
sql.active_accounts_as_of_1998_12_31: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.account_id) AS active_accounts_as_of_1998_12_31 FROM trans t WHERE t.date <= DATE '1998-12-31';

chart_spec.layout_intent: growth line and KPI on top, frequency and district heatmap below
